reviews.review_description: Just go to braindancevr(dot)com and you can from there. I was in the same predicament and managed to sort it out.
I cannot retrieve the password for my login, there is no fogot password option. No email adress to contact developer.
Good but needs more free access experiences
Can't reset password. Pretty basic stuff.

reviews.review_title: No way to reset password or contact cs
reviews.review_description:
Very frustrating 

From what’s available publicly, the BDViewer website doesn’t show a visible support or account portal, and there isn’t a built-in “Forgot Password” link on the sign-in screen 


I’ve been trying h gain access to the app now for three days and I cannot get in. I cannot find any visual means of support. I can’t find any company that wants to help me reset the password. So short of that man, Im requesting  either a refund or you guys need to figure something out pretty quick quick and give me a link to get back to customer service to reset my password. For as much trouble I’ve been through trying to find anything to reset that password, it’s getting pretty old. That should be the first thing in app requires that you have any visible support  link to get back to customer service when  something goes sideways you guys have zero ways to do that and it gets very irritating.

Developers, if you’re even paying attention to reviews at all, please send me a way to get back to my account via  my password- or set me up with a refund  since I can’t use your app.   Ty

reviews.review_title: here's how to reset your password
reviews.review_description:
go to the website braindancevr[dot]com and click on the login button, then click forgot password and enter your email address, follow instructions in the email to reset your password for BDViewer/BDVR. You're welcome!

Or email support at support[at]bdviewer[dot]com
I only have a 128 gig 3s and this lets you download shows but they take up a bunch of space. I downloaded the one on Greek Life and it took 26 gigs
